title: ‘You can’t live without us’: Have fossil fuel giants gone back on their green promises?
description: A new analysis warns that some of the world’s biggest fossil fuel companies have entered a ‘gaslighting’ phase to bolster their profits.View on euronews

title: Chinese pancakes trace back 5,000 years, with references appear in ancient paintings, poems
description: Pancakes are a common breakfast in many parts of China today, but few people are aware that the popular meal has been around for 5,000 years. An ancient griddle unearthed from the Yangshao site in central China’s Henan province reveals that the history of Chinese pancakes could date back to at least 50 centuries ago. As for their invention, legend has it that pancakes came into being when Nuwa mended the heavens. In primordial times, when the world fell apart, mother goddess Nuwa gathered...

title: New bid to build swimming pool on part of ancient Roman fort
description: A new bid has been launched to build a swimming pool on part of an ancient Roman fort.

title: Hidden South West beach with stunning waterfall and fossil hunting
description: This secret Somerset beach at the foot of the Quantocks boasts two stunning waterfalls and is ideal for a family day out
